skills.name: list-games
skills.description: List VR games available at VR Café Lyon, with optional category filtering.

skills.name: check-availability
skills.description: Check available VR session time slots for a given date, player count, duration, and VR type.

skills.name: make-reservation
skills.description: Book a VR session at VR Café Lyon with full confirmation (email + admin notification).

skills.name: get-pricing
skills.description: Get VR session pricing per person by duration and player count.
